actors.name: User
actors.description: Interacts with the Berachain ecosystem, dApps, and governance.

actors.name: Validator Operator
actors.description: Operates a validator node to secure the network and participate in PoL.

actors.name: Protocol/Project
actors.description: Develops dApps and participates in PoL to attract users and liquidity.

actors.name: Guardian
actors.description: Provides oversight and can cancel malicious governance proposals.

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: Manages and supplies incentive tokens for a specific Reward Vault.

actors.name: BGT Foundation
actors.description: Entity involved in reviewing RFRV proposals.

assets.name: LP Token (Receipt Token)
assets.description: Represents a user's share in a liquidity pool or other productive activity.

assets.name: Incentive Token
assets.description: ERC20 tokens offered by protocols to incentivize BGT emissions.

assets.name: Private Keys
assets.description: Cryptographic keys used to control wallet access and sign transactions.

assets.name: Voting Power
assets.description: The ability to vote on governance proposals, derived from BGT holdings/delegation.

assets.name: Governance Proposal
assets.description: A formal proposal for changes to the Berachain protocol or dApps.

assets.name: Proof of Entitlement
assets.description: Off-chain data used to verify a user's eligibility to claim incentives/fees.

assets.name: Transaction Fees (BERA)
assets.description: Fees paid in BERA for processing transactions on the network.

assets.name: USDC
assets.description: USD-pegged stablecoin used as collateral for HONEY.

assets.name: BYUSD (pyUSD)
assets.description: USD-pegged stablecoin used as collateral for HONEY.

assets.name: WETH
assets.description: Wrapped Ether, used in BEX liquidity pools.

assets.name: WBTC
assets.description: Wrapped Bitcoin, used in BEX liquidity pools.

assets.name: Vault Shares
assets.description: Represents a user's share of collateral deposited in a HONEY vault.

assets.name: Testnet User RFA Allocations
assets.description: Allocations for testnet users eligible for airdrop.

assets.name: Ecosystem NFTs (Airdrop)
assets.description: NFTs from ecosystem projects eligible for airdrop.

assets.name: stgUSDC
assets.description: USD-pegged stablecoin used as collateral for HONEY.

components.name: Berachain Network
components.description: The core blockchain infrastructure.

components.name: Wallet
components.description: User-controlled software for managing keys and interacting with the network.

components.name: Berachain Bridge
components.description: Cross-chain bridge for transferring assets.

components.name: BEX
components.description: Native DEX dApp for swapping and providing liquidity.

components.name: Honey Swap
components.description: Native dApp for minting, burning, and trading HONEY.

components.name: BeraHub
components.description: Frontend interface for interacting with Berachain dApps and PoL features.

components.name: Reward Vault
components.description: Smart contract for staking PoL-eligible assets and distributing BGT/Incentives.

components.name: Governance Contract
components.description: Manages the on-chain governance process.

components.name: HoneyFactory
components.description: Core contract for minting and redeeming HONEY.

components.name: FeeCollector
components.description: Collects fees from native dApps and distributes them.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor
components.description: Manages the distribution and claiming of incentives and fees to BGT boosters.

components.name: Backend Service
components.description: Off-chain service supporting incentive claiming proofs.

components.name: Validator Node
components.description: Software/hardware operated by validators to participate in consensus.

components.name: CometBFT
components.description: The consensus algorithm engine.

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: Modular framework integrating CometBFT with EVM execution.

components.name: EVM Execution Client
components.description: Software responsible for executing transactions and managing state.

components.name: Honey Vault
components.description: Smart contract that stores collateral for minting HONEY.

components.name: BeraChef Contract
components.description: Contract involved in Reward Vault whitelisting.

components.name: BlockRewardController Contract
components.description: Manages BGT emission constants.

components.name: Auto-Incentivizer
components.description: Automatically offers incentives from foundation vault fees.

components.name: Reward Vault Factory Contract
components.description: Contract for permissionlessly creating Reward Vaults.

components.name: Governance Forum
components.description: Platform for discussing governance proposals.

data_flows.description: User accesses/stores private key in wallet.
Signed transaction sent from wallet to network.
User transfers NFT to the bridge.
Bridge transfers/mints NFT on Berachain.
User transfers tokens to the bridge.
Bridge transfers/mints tokens on Berachain.
User adds Berachain network details to wallet.
User interacts with BEX for swapping or providing liquidity.
User interacts with Honey Swap for HONEY operations.
User interacts with the BeraHub frontend.
User stakes LP/Receipt tokens in a Reward Vault.
Validator operator configures BGT emission allocation weights for Reward Vaults.
Protocol supplies incentive tokens to their Reward Vault.
Incentive Token Manager adds incentives to a Reward Vault.
Backend service updates proofs for incentive claiming.
User claims incentives or fees from the distributor.
User creates or votes on a governance proposal.
User delegates BGT to a validator operator.
Validator node proposes a block to the network.
Validator node sends collected dApp fees to the FeeCollector.
FeeCollector sends WBERA from auctioned fees to the distributor.
Distributor makes WBERA or Incentive Tokens claimable by users.
User burns BGT via the network.
User deposits collateral into HoneyFactory to mint HONEY.
HoneyFactory transfers collateral to vault and receives shares.
HoneyFactory mints and transfers HONEY to user.
User sends HONEY to HoneyFactory to redeem collateral.
HoneyFactory transfers collateral or shares back to user upon redemption.
Communication between execution and consensus layers (Engine API).
Communication within the consensus layer.
Validator node provides data to the execution client.
Validator node participates in consensus.
Network distributes BGT block rewards to the validator node.
Network distributes transaction fees to the validator node.
User receives LP/Receipt token after providing liquidity to BEX.
Reward Vault sends accumulated BGT rewards to the Incentive Distributor.
BGT Incentive Distributor sends incentive commission to the validator operator.
User receives BERA from the network after burning BGT.
HoneyFactory transfers fee shares to the FeeCollector.
Governance Contract sends execution command to the network.
Guardian sends cancellation command to the Governance Contract.
User submits discussion or post on the Governance Forum.

trust_boundaries.name: User Wallet Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's local wallet environment from the public blockchain network.

trust_boundaries.name: Bridge Ingress Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the cross-chain bridge component from the Berachain L1.

trust_boundaries.name: Off-chain Service Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the off-chain backend service from the on-chain incentive distributor contract.

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the governance system from the core dApp and protocol contracts it governs.

trust_boundaries.name: Validator Node Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the validator's operational environment from the rest of the network.

trust_boundaries.name: Execution/Consensus Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the transaction execution layer from the consensus layer within the network.

trust_boundaries.name: Protocol/Project Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates external protocols/projects from the core Berachain network.

trust_boundaries.name: Incentive Token Manager Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the external incentive token manager from the core Berachain network.

trust_boundaries.name: Guardian Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Guardian multisig from the Governance Contract.

trust_boundaries.name: BeraHub Frontend Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the untrusted BeraHub frontend from the core Berachain network.

trust_boundaries.name: Reward Vault / Distributor Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Reward Vault contract from the BGT Incentive Distributor contract.

trust_boundaries.name: FeeCollector / Distributor Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the FeeCollector contract from the BGT Incentive Distributor contract.

trust_boundaries.name: HoneyFactory / Honey Vault Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the HoneyFactory contract from the specific Honey Vault contracts.

behaviors.name: Claim Airdrop
behaviors.description: User accepts airdrop tokens.

behaviors.name: Connect Wallet
behaviors.description: User configures wallet software to interact with the chain RPC.

behaviors.name: Get BERA via Bridging
behaviors.description: User transfers tokens from another chain to Berachain using the bridge.

behaviors.name: Provide Liquidity
behaviors.description: User deposits tokens into a BEX pool.

behaviors.name: Swap Assets on BEX
behaviors.description: User exchanges tokens on the DEX.

behaviors.name: Swap Assets on Honey Swap
behaviors.description: User exchanges assets for HONEY or vice versa.

behaviors.name: Mint HONEY
behaviors.description: User deposits collateral to create HONEY.

behaviors.name: Burn HONEY
behaviors.description: User redeems HONEY for collateral.

behaviors.name: Stake LP/Receipt Token
behaviors.description: User deposits PoL-eligible tokens to earn BGT.

behaviors.name: Delegate BGT
behaviors.description: User assigns BGT voting/boost power to a validator operator.

behaviors.name: Boost Validator
behaviors.description: User's delegation influences validator rewards.

behaviors.name: Claim Incentives/Fees
behaviors.description: User retrieves earned incentive tokens or dApp fees.

behaviors.name: Create Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: User initiates a change proposal using BGT voting power.

behaviors.name: Vote on Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: User casts a vote on an active proposal using BGT voting power.

behaviors.name: Redeem BGT for BERA
behaviors.description: User converts BGT to BERA (one-way).

behaviors.name: Stake BERA
behaviors.description: Validator operator locks BERA to participate in consensus.

behaviors.name: Propose Block
behaviors.description: Validator operator's node creates and submits a new block for consensus.

behaviors.name: Direct BGT Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator operator allocates earned BGT emissions to chosen reward vaults.

behaviors.name: Receive Incentives
behaviors.description: Validator operator receives incentive tokens commission from the distributor.

behaviors.name: Receive dApp Fees
behaviors.description: Validator operator receives a share of collected dApp fees from the distributor.

behaviors.name: Create Reward Vault
behaviors.description: Protocol deploys a new Reward Vault contract via the factory.

behaviors.name: Supply Incentive Tokens
behaviors.description: Protocol deposits tokens into their Reward Vault to incentivize validators.

behaviors.name: Add Incentives
behaviors.description: Token manager deposits incentive tokens into a whitelisted vault.

behaviors.name: Cancel Malicious Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardian prevents execution of a harmful governance proposal.

behaviors.name: Update Proofs
behaviors.description: Off-chain service provides data for claiming.

behaviors.name: Execute Transactions
behaviors.description: Execution client processes transaction logic and state changes on the network.

behaviors.name: Manage Consensus
behaviors.description: BeaconKit coordinates validator agreement on block order and validity for the network.

behaviors.name: Provide Consensus Algorithm
behaviors.description: CometBFT implements the core consensus logic for BeaconKit.

behaviors.name: Validator Node receives BGT block rewards
behaviors.description: The network distributes BGT block rewards to the validator node.

behaviors.name: Validator Node receives Gas fees/Priority fees
behaviors.description: The network distributes transaction fees to the validator node.

behaviors.name: User receives LP/Receipt token
behaviors.description: User receives LP/Receipt token from BEX after providing liquidity.

behaviors.name: User receives BGT rewards (claimable)
behaviors.description: User receives claimable BGT rewards from the Incentive Distributor.

behaviors.name: Validator Operator receives Incentive commission
behaviors.description: Validator operator receives incentive commission from the BGT Incentive Distributor.

behaviors.name: Validator Operator receives dApp Fees
behaviors.description: Validator operator receives a share of dApp fees from the BGT Incentive Distributor.

behaviors.name: User receives BERA after burning BGT
behaviors.description: User receives BERA from the network after burning BGT.

behaviors.name: HoneyFactory transfers fee shares
behaviors.description: HoneyFactory transfers fee shares generated from mint/burn to the FeeCollector.

behaviors.name: Validator Operator sets/queues incentive commission rate
behaviors.description: Validator operator configures their incentive commission rate on their node.

behaviors.name: User submits RFRV discussion/post
behaviors.description: User posts discussion or RFRV details on the Governance Forum.

behaviors.name: BGT Foundation reviews RFRV proposals
behaviors.description: BGT Foundation reviews governance proposals (RFRVs).

behaviors.name: Guardian reviews RFRV proposals
behaviors.description: Guardian reviews governance proposals (RFRVs).

behaviors.name: Governance proposal is Executed
behaviors.description: The Governance Contract executes a passed proposal on the network.

behaviors.name: Incentive Token Manager sets Incentive Rate
behaviors.description: Incentive Token Manager defines the rate for incentive distribution from a Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: User contributes Incentive Token amount
behaviors.description: Any user can contribute incentive tokens to a Reward Vault (to be applied by manager).

behaviors.name: Validator Node provides data to Execution Client
behaviors.description: Validator node sends transactions and block templates to the execution client.

behaviors.name: HoneyFactory transfers collateral to vault
behaviors.description: HoneyFactory sends deposited collateral to the specific Honey Vault.

behaviors.name: Honey Vault transfers shares to HoneyFactory
behaviors.description: Honey Vault issues and sends shares representing collateral to the HoneyFactory.

behaviors.name: HoneyFactory transfers collateral/shares back to user
behaviors.description: HoneyFactory sends collateral or shares to the user upon HONEY redemption.
